upcoming: [M3-9988] - Allow auto-assign of Subnet IPv4 ranges when a Nodebalancer is assigned to a VPC (#12247)

## Description 📝

Allow auto-assign of Subnet IPv4 ranges when a Nodebalancer is assigned to a VPC

## How to test 🧪

### Prerequisites

- Add the customer tags mentioned in the Project Tracker
- Enable the NodeBalancer-VPC Integration flag


### Verification steps

- [ ] Navigate to the Create Nodebalancer page
- [ ] Select a region that has a vpc/subnet
- [ ] Select the vpc & subnet in the "Assign VPC" section
- [ ] Observe the checkbox to be checked
- [ ] Create a nodebalancer
